Qiu Ying

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Garden for Solitary Enjoyment
by Qiu Ying
China, Ming dynasty (1368–1644) · 1515–52 · Handscroll; ink and light color on silk
Qiu Ying Paintings
by Qiu Ying
Ming · Qiu Ying · 1494–1552
One of the "Four Masters of the Ming Dynasty." Rose from lacquer-worker to court painter. His handscrolls of palace scenes and mountain recluses are among the most copied in Chinese art history.
Zhao Mengfu Writing the Heart (Hridaya) Sutra in Exchange for Tea
by Qiu Ying
China, Ming dynasty (1368–1644) · 1542–43 · handscroll, ink and light color on paper
←Lan Ying Yintuoluo→
